title: trophaeum rectangulum
intro: Trophaeum rectangulum, also known as the Stinking Iris, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its distinctive, unpleasant odor and purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Trophaeum rectangulum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential use in treating conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Trophaeum rectangulum is often used in the form of tinctures or infusions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
